SEARCH
Package com.github.dakusui.symfonion.song

Class Bar

java.lang.Object
com.github.dakusui.symfonion.song.Bar
public class Bar extends Object

A class that models a "bar" in a musical score.

  • Constructor Summary

    Description

  • Constructor Details

    • Bar

      public Bar(com.google.gson.JsonObject barJsonObject, Map<String,Groove> grooves, Map<String,NoteMap> noteMaps, Predicate<String> partFilter) throws SymfonionException, CompatJsonException

      Creates a Bar object.

      barJsonObject stores content of the bar.

      barJsonObject
      {
  "beats": "<beatsDefiningString>",
  "parts": [
    { "name": "<partName>", "<inline pattern definition>" },
    ...
  ],
  "groove": "<grooveName>",
  "$noteMap": "<noteMapName>",
  "labels": ["<label1>", "<label2>", "..."]
}

      root is used only for composing messages on errors.

      Parameters:
      barJsonObject - A JSON object from which a bar is created.
      grooves - A map that defines a groove on which this bar should be played.
      noteMaps - A note map with which this bar should be played.
      partFilter - A predicate that filters parts to be played in this bar.
      Throws:
      SymfonionException - Data processing was failed.
      CompatJsonException - Invalid JSON is given.

  • Method Details

    • labels

      public List<String> labels()

      Returns labels attached to this bar object.

      Returns:
      A list of labels.

    • partNames

      public Set<String> partNames()

      Returns a set of part names.

      Returns:
      A set of part names.

    • patternsForPart

      public List<Pattern> patternsForPart(String partName)

      Returns the list of stacked Pattern objects for the given partName. Multiple entries with the same $name in $parts are played simultaneously.

      Parameters:
      partName - A part name for which the patterns should be returned.
      Returns:
      A list of Pattern objects (stacked).

    • beats

      public Fraction beats()

      Returns Beats that determine the duration of this object.

      Returns:
      Beats

    • groove

      public Groove groove()

      Returns a Groove object that determines "groove" of this bar

      Returns:
      A Groove object.
      See Also:
      • Groove

    • lookUpJsonNode

      public com.google.gson.JsonElement lookUpJsonNode(String partName)

      Find up a JsonElement in $parts array that has $name matching partName. Returns the first matching element, or the $parts array itself if not found.

      Parameters:
      partName - partName used for searching.
      Returns:
      A matching JSON element, or the array if not found.
